questions.q: Which specific strain of hantavirus, known for being capable of person-to-person transmission, caused the May 2026 outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship?
In May 2026, a deadly hantavirus outbreak that led to a mass passenger quarantine occurred aboard which cruise ship?
Which 29-year-old Memphis Grizzlies forward, who was named to the NBA All-Rookie team in 2020, tragically died in May 2026?

Barry Blaustein, who passed away at 72 on May 12, 2026, was known for writing Eddie Murphy films and directing which acclaimed 1999 professional wrestling documentary?
options: The Resurrection of Jake the Snake

questions.q: What new name was officially given to Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) after a landmark global consensus study published in May 2026?
